seoTitle: Sandigo vs Sandon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sandigo and Sandon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandigo and Sandon.
heading: Sandigo vs Sandon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandigo, New South Wales and Sandon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandigo has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sandon (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandigo or Sandon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandigo has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Sandon scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandigo scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Sandon scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandigo or Sandon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandigo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
